message:
feat(lock-orchestration): unified resource locking, deadlock detection, and safe agent handoff (ft-3681t.3.7)

Adds lock_orchestration module with generic ResourceId (File/Pane/Bead/Custom),
LockOrchestrator with cycle-based deadlock detection in the wait-for graph,
atomic group acquisition with rollback, lock expiry/reaping, and a safe handoff
protocol with escrow/accept/rollback semantics. 49 unit tests pass.

Also fixes pre-existing compilation errors: runtime.rs watch::Receiver borrow
mutability, wezterm.rs missing CompatRuntime trait import.

Closes ft-3681t.3.7.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
